task_description: Execute PHP.md in this repo. Migrate the Astro API surface to a cPanel-friendly PHP backend by adding shared PHP bootstrap/config/db/auth/validation/response/rate-limit/mail helpers plus /public_html/api/contact.php, jobs.php, and news.php. Preserve the existing frontend contracts for /api/contact, /api/jobs, and /api/news based on src/pages/api/*.ts and the frontend callers. Implement practical deployment-ready project structure inside this repo, keep frontend changes minimal, verify behavior, and report concrete file changes.
